generated_assessment.reasoning: The highly agreeable, trusting, and tender-minded profile (agreeableness >97th pct) is susceptible to a petition astroturf campaign (T2, weeks-long) that supplies confirmatory evidence and elite-distrust cues aligned with her already negative baseline (-137). Very high compliance (100th pct) and high dutifulness (57th pct) mean she is likely to take manufactured consensus signals from trusted-seeming community sources as social proof, intensifying her existing opposition to defense spending increases without crossing post-hoc rationalization thresholds. However, her moderately high openness-to-ideas (83rd pct) and stable emotional profile (neuroticism 41st pct, stress-vulnerability 31st pct) prevent a large swing, limiting movement to about a 30-point increase in opposition.

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: intensify and solidify an already negative opinion on Defense Spending Increase Support — push it further in the negative direction
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: defense and national security, related policy debates, and societal impacts
